description: EMS overview — Daily Energy, Battery SoC, Tariff

panels.description: PV yield, grid import, grid export, and net consumption per day (kWh). Requires S03 enrichment.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "ems")
  |> range(start: -7d)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "ems_system")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "pv_on_grid_w")
  |> drop(columns: ["control_state", "huawei_available", "victron_available"])
  |> group(columns: ["_field"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1d, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: r._value * 5.0 / 3600000.0}))
  |> set(key: "_field", value: "PV Yield")

from(bucket: "ems")
  |> range(start: -7d)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "ems_system")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "grid_power_w")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._value > 0.0)
  |> drop(columns: ["control_state", "huawei_available", "victron_available"])
  |> group(columns: ["_field"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1d, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: r._value * 5.0 / 3600000.0}))
  |> set(key: "_field", value: "Grid Import")

from(bucket: "ems")
  |> range(start: -7d)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "ems_system")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "grid_power_w")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._value < 0.0)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: -r._value}))
  |> drop(columns: ["control_state", "huawei_available", "victron_available"])
  |> group(columns: ["_field"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1d, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: r._value * 5.0 / 3600000.0}))
  |> set(key: "_field", value: "Grid Export")

from(bucket: "ems")
  |> range(start: -7d)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "ems_system")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "consumption_w")
  |> drop(columns: ["control_state", "huawei_available", "victron_available"])
  |> group(columns: ["_field"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1d, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: r._value * 5.0 / 3600000.0}))
  |> set(key: "_field", value: "Consumption")

panels.title: Daily Energy (last 7 days)

panels.description: Huawei (LUNA2000) and Victron SoC % over time. Both lines should track together for healthy SoC-balanced operation.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "ems")
  |> range(start: -24h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "ems_system")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "huawei_soc_pct")
  |> drop(columns: ["control_state", "huawei_available", "victron_available"])
  |> group(columns: ["_field"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1m, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> set(key: "_field", value: "Huawei SoC %")

from(bucket: "ems")
  |> range(start: -24h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "ems_system")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "victron_soc_pct")
  |> drop(columns: ["control_state", "huawei_available", "victron_available"])
  |> group(columns: ["_field"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1m, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> set(key: "_field", value: "Victron SoC %")

from(bucket: "ems")
  |> range(start: -24h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "ems_system")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "combined_soc_pct")
  |> drop(columns: ["control_state", "huawei_available", "victron_available"])
  |> group(columns: ["_field"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1m, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> set(key: "_field", value: "Combined SoC %")

panels.title: Battery SoC (last 24h)

panels.description: Effective composite tariff rate per hour (EUR/kWh). Off-peak ~0.08 EUR/kWh, peak ~0.28 EUR/kWh.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "ems")
  |> range(start: -24h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "ems_tariff")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "effective_rate_eur_kwh")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 5m, fn: last, createEmpty: false)
  |> set(key: "_field", value: "Effective Rate")

from(bucket: "ems")
  |> range(start: -24h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "ems_tariff")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "octopus_rate_eur_kwh")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 5m, fn: last, createEmpty: false)
  |> set(key: "_field", value: "Octopus Rate")

from(bucket: "ems")
  |> range(start: -24h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "ems_tariff")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "modul3_rate_eur_kwh")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 5m, fn: last, createEmpty: false)
  |> set(key: "_field", value: "Modul3 Rate")

panels.title: Tariff Rate (last 24h)

title: EMS Overview
